textByHashes.4460f1429fc7efd87668bb33e892e250c75cec16: Sea piracy just ain't what it used to be, so my crew and I have had to make do on land. We specialise in 'acquiring' valuable antiquities from around the city and shipping them to our friends overseas.
textByHashes.b333e3f5b50338493bafe1992f76852f0fe9bc08: Of course they do, for the right price. That's just how things work around here, kid.
textByHashes.bdb4502eb344b1c4efd16e7983b59f668d354c17: Yeah, you look like you might be able to help me out. If you think you've got what it takes, I might have a job for you.
textByHashes.515300f7fb0b1b697b8f601218325d1d5f74928e: What are you playing at? I've given you a job, get it done.
textByHashes.07d3cb2f542af95d4be9e8c0dcbd9f265e8be1cc: You need to recover an artefact for me. It can be found in the .
textByHashes.02450c11ddbc511552654b4dc256ef9e86ecd973: Watch yourself, if the guards catch you carrying hot goods they'll throw you in the brig.
textByHashes.cb4982d39c59ce9fb54f9711845740a7f53fca43: Congratulations, you're a failure. Come back to me when you think you've got what it takes to get the job done.
textByHashes.6f40534b1b691392421fd2901fed5b3673e6ceae: This is exactly what our friends overseas were looking for. Here's your cut. Let me know when you're ready for more work.
textByHashes.2d27127a382df9a274289420d5353865c38ccefa: I need you to answer this for me.
textByHashes.d4b12bb58e5de9d4949e143ad973d433223a738d: How can that be? Go check again!
textByHashes.223fe921dcdf44656df4ea9b0b0f51d0cb97ae30: I've got nothing to say to you.
